zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Tyrrell於大約1405年出生在英國艾可易亞斯特 霍登時，他的父親Sir John Tyrrell25歲，母親Alice Coggeshall24歲。他於大約1423年與Anne Marney在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1460年被列為sheriff of hertfordshire。他去世於1477年3月28日在他的家鄉享年73歲，埋葬在英國艾可易亞斯特 霍登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Tyrrell于大约1405年出生在英国艾可易亞斯特 霍登时，他的父亲Sir John Tyrrell25岁，母亲Alice Coggeshall24岁。他于大约1423年与Anne Marney在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1460年被列为sheriff of hertfordshire。他去世于1477年3月28日在他的家乡享年73岁，埋葬在英国艾可易亞斯特 霍登。

nameMeanings.name: Tyrrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): perhaps a nickname from a derivative of Old French tirer ‘to pull’, in the same sense as French Tirand ‘one who pulls on the reins’, hence ‘obstinate, stubborn’. This name may have become confused with Turrell . A branch of this Anglo-Norman family has been in Ireland since the 12th century. Its name has been Gaelicized as Tirial.
English: habitational name from Tirril (Cumbria), which derives from Old Norse tyri ‘resinous wood’ + erg ‘shieling’.

variants.name: Terrel
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Terrell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Tirrell
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Terrill
meanings: English (Cornwall; of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Turrell
meanings: most frequently an Anglo-Norman French pronunciation of Thorold (Old Norse Thóraldr, from the elements Thórr ‘Thor’ + valdr ‘power, rule’). This name and that in 2 may have become confused with Tyrrell .
from Middle English T(h)urild (Old Norse Thórhildr, Thorild, the latter a rare woman's name from the divine name Thórr ‘Thor’ + hildr ‘battle’).

variants.name: Tyrell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Trill
meanings: German: topographic name for someone who lived by the turnstile at the entrance to a village.
English (Sussex, also Kent): nickname, perhaps from Middle English tril(le) ‘turn, roll, whirl, spin’ (origin unknown, but perhaps Old English tyrl).

English (Sussex, also Kent) and Welsh: habitational name from one or more places named with Middle English tril(le) ‘turn, roll, whirl, spin’ (Old English tyrl), often used to describe moving water, such as Trill in Axminster (Devon), Tirle Brook (Gloucestershire and Worcestershire), and Trill Mill Brook (Oxfordshire).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Tyrrell was born about 1405, in East Horndon, Essex, England, his father, Sir John Tyrrell, was 25 and his mother, Alice Coggeshall, was 24. He married Anne Marney about 1423, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. In 1460, at the age of 56, his occupation is listed as sheriff of hertfordshire. He died on 28 March 1477, in his hometown, at the age of 73, and was buried in East Horndon, Essex, England.

fr.Heron Hall, Horndon on the Hill, Essex,: Horndon on the Hill, Essex, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Tyrrell est né environ 1405, à East Horndon, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Tyrrell, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alice Coggeshall, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Anne Marney environ 1423, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. En 1460, à l’âge de 56 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of hertfordshire. Il est décédé le 28 mars 1477, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à East Horndon, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Tyrrell um 1405 in East Horndon, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Tyrrell 25 und seine Mutter Alice Coggeshall 24. Er hat um 1423 in Essex, England, United Kingdom Anne Marney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1460, als er 56 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of hertfordshire aufgeführt. Er starb am 28. März 1477 im Alter von 73 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in East Horndon, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Tyrrell è nato il circa 1405 nel East Horndon, Essex, England, il suo padre, Sir John Tyrrell, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Alice Coggeshall, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Anne Marney circa 1423, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1460, all'età di 56 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of hertfordshire. Morì il 28 marzo 1477, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a East Horndon, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Tyrrellが約1405年にイギリスエセックスエアスト ホールンドンで生まれた時，父Sir John Tyrrellは25歳，母Alice Coggeshallは24歳であった。約1423年にイギリスイギリスエセックスでAnne Marneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1460年，56歳の時，職業はsheriff of hertfordshireと記録されている。彼は1477年3月28日に故郷で73歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスエアスト ホールンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Tyrrell(이)가 대략 1405년 영국 에세스 이스트 호른던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Tyrrell(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Coggeshall(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1423년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Anne Marney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1460년, 56세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of hertfordshire이었다. 그는 1477년 3월 28일 그의 고향에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 이스트 호른던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Tyrrell nasceu aproximadamente 1405, em East Horndon, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Tyrrell, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Alice Coggeshall, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Marney aproximadamente 1423, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1460, com 56 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of hertfordshire. Ele faleceu em 28 de março de 1477, em sua cidade natal, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em East Horndon, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.Heron Hall, Horndon on the Hill, Essex,: хаурндон он т хилл, эссекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Tyrrell родился около 1405 г. в местности эаст хаурндон, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Tyrrell было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Coggeshall, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Marney около 1423 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. В 1460 году, в возрасте 56 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of hertfordshire. Он умер 28 марта 1477 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности эаст хаурндон, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Tyrrell nació aproximadamente 1405, en East Horndon, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Tyrrell, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Alice Coggeshall, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Anne Marney aproximadamente 1423, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1460, a la edad de 56 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of hertfordshire. Murió el 28 de marzo de 1477, en su pueblo, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en East Horndon, Essex, Inglaterra.
